title: Newthinking 96L Log Baskets, Black Felt Wood Storage Baskets Log Carrier with Pockets and Removable Handles for Indoor Fireplaces Wood Storage
features: High Quality Material: This log basket is made of durable 4mm thick felt, supporting heavy loads, resistant to tearing, convenient for carrying and storing firewood, and also providing excellent protection for your delicate floors, reducing wood chip mess and preventing scratches

96L Large Capacity: The wood storage basket measures 60x40x40cm. The 96L large capacity is ideal for transporting large amounts of logs or firewood. With double-stitched reinforcement and a thickened bottom design, this firewood bag remains stable and reliable whether transporting or storing beside the fireplace

Pocket Design and Handles: This indoor firewood basket features convenient pockets for storing lighters, matches, and fire-starting tools, keeping everything organised and within reach. The basket has two wooden handles for easy carrying

Space-Saving: This firewood transport bag can be easily folded in seconds after use. The space-saving design allows for neat storage in a cupboard, on a shelf, or in the car boot, making it an ideal companion for outdoor adventures or indoor fireplace maintenance

Easy to Clean: The firewood bag is easy to maintain and clean, simply wipe with a damp cloth and air dry. The advanced felt material not only retains a smooth appearance after folding but also withstands multiple uses without deformation. For deeper creases, gently iron with a cool iron
description: Store & Carry Firewood with Unmatched Style & Function Introducing the premium felt log basket that masterfully combines robust functionality with sleek, practical design. Engineered for both daily fireplace maintenance and adventurous outdoor trips, this versatile carrier redefines convenient firewood storage and transport. Say goodbye to scattered wood chips, scratched floors, and disorganized kindling—this basket is your all-in-one solution for a tidy and efficient hearth area. Durable & Protective Construction Crafted from high-density, 4mm thick felt, this basket is built to endure. The material is exceptionally tear-resistant and capable of supporting heavy loads of firewood with ease. More than just strong, it acts as a protective barrier for your delicate hardwood or tiled floors, effectively containing messy wood chips, bark, and dirt. It safeguards your surfaces from unsightly scratches and marks, keeping your living space clean and pristine. Ample 96L Capacity with Enhanced Stability With generous dimensions of 60x40x40cm, this basket offers a substantial 96-liter capacity. It is perfectly sized for transporting a significant load of logs from outdoors or storing a plentiful supply beside your fireplace or wood stove. Designed for reliability, it features double-stitched reinforcement at critical stress points and a thickened, sturdy bottom. This ensures the basket maintains its shape and remains stable, whether it’s holding a full stack of wood or being carried across your garden. Thoughtful Organization & Easy Transport Functionality meets smart organization with the integrated storage pocket. Keep essential fire-starting tools like lighters, matches, and newspaper neatly stowed and always within arm’s reach, eliminating frustrating searches. Two sturdy, smooth-finished wooden handles provide a comfortable and secure grip, making it effortless to carry heavy loads of firewood from your storage pile to your fireplace with complete control. Space-Saving & Portability When not in use, convenience continues. This innovative firewood bag can be flattened and folded down in mere seconds. Its space-saving folded form allows for neat storage in a cupboard, on a shelf, or in the trunk of your car, making it an indispensable companion for camping trips, cabin getaways, or simply for efficient home storage. It’s as practical for indoor hearth maintenance as it is for outdoor adventures. Effortless Maintenance & Lasting Quality Keeping your basket looking its best is simple. For regular cleaning, just wipe it down with a damp cloth and allow it to air dry. The high-quality felt material is designed for long-term use; it retains its smooth, attractive appearance even after repeated folding and unfolding, resisting deformation. For any deep creases that may form, you can easily restore its sleek look by gently ironing with a cool setting. Ideal for use by the fireplace, wood stove, fire pit, or for general outdoor storage, this multi-functional log basket is the perfect blend of durability, capacity, and intelligent design. Elevate your firewood handling experience—invest in a storage solution that works as hard as you do to create a warm, cozy, and tidy atmosphere.
